stemHtml: According to OPS regulations, what is the maximum distance from an Adequate Aerodrome for Performance Class B or C aeroplanes without ETOPS approvals, when operated for Commercial Air Transport?

options.a: 60 minutes at the one-engine-inoperative cruise speed or 200 NM, whichever is less.
options.b: 120 minutes at the one-engine-inoperative cruise speed or 300 NM, whichever is less.
options.c: 100 minutes at the one-engine-inoperative cruise speed or 400 NM, whichever is less.
